name: Martha Washington's Devil's Food
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over boiling water; add 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup buttermilk.
Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Allow to cool.
2. Sift flour once, then measure and sift together with baking powder, soda,
and salt three times.
3. Cream butter thoroughly, adding 3/4 cup sugar gradually. Beat until light
and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually add about 1/4 of the flour mixture to the butter mixture, mixing
thoroughly.
6. Add the chocolate mixture and blend well.
7. Alternately add the remaining flour with buttermilk, a small amount at a
time, beating very thoroughly after each addition.
8. Stir in vanilla.
9. Pour batter into a greased 15x9x2-inch pan and bake in a moderate oven (350°F)
for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool completely, then trim edges, cut crosswise into halves,
and assemble as a two-layer cake, matching edges carefully.
11. Spread tops and sides with Martha Washington's Fudge Frosting (see recipe),
or add chopped nuts to part of the frosting for filling.
